answer: Discord provides free access to its developer API for building apps [1]. While individual Discord user accounts have paid tiers like Nitro, the developer platform itself is not a paid service for basic API access [1][2]. To monetize your application natively, you can use the Premium Apps feature, which allows you to set up SKUs for one-time purchases or recurring subscriptions [3][4]. Eligibility for monetization requires a verified app, a developer team, and compliance with Discord's developer policies [5]. You can then use the Entitlements API to verify user access to premium features [3][4].
